title: Triage decision payload (v1, pinned)
description: The 'decision' object for the triage persona. Exactly one action; per-action required fields. Agent emits structured fields only — never rendered comment markdown.

clarification_questions.description: Exactly one diagnostic question for the reporter. Structured field; the apply step renders it into a comment.

triage_summary.description: Neutral summary of the issue in the agent's own words (NOT a verbatim echo of issue text).

suggested_labels.description: Label names drawn ONLY from the repo's live vocabulary. Prompt restricts to <=1 type + <=1 area label.

blocking_url.description: URL of the concrete open issue/PR that must land first (blocked action).

duplicate_of.description: Issue number (integer) or URL of the issue this duplicates.

confidence.description: Match confidence for blocked/duplicate. The agent downgrades weak matches to 'insufficient' per the prompt; this records the kept match's confidence.
